title: Board view filters don't carry over to mobile app
excerpt: I have made a bunch of different board views on desktop, which each have different advanced filters. We use these different views more than the main board view. The issue is that these advanced filters in these views do …

posts.author: tomp (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml: I have made a bunch of different board views on desktop, which each have different advanced filters. We use these different views more than the main board view. The issue is that these advanced filters in these views do not carry over to the mobile app. When looking at these views on the mobile app it’s as if no filters are applied and you’re just seeing the entire board. This is an issue and almost renders the mobile app useless to my team.
